creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
For me it is even worse -- on my amd64-system install is looking for i386-versions of some static libraries:

===>   Registering installation for llvm17-17.0.1
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /opt/llvm17/lib/clang/17/include/arm_sve.h, ignoring
